decision: The platform enforces tags on every landing zone, sourced from the application profile.
why: Manually applied tags drift — when an incident fires, the email points to someone who left the team, and the alert goes unanswered.

links.note: Nightly tag remediation runs as a Container App Job.
Engineer and owner emails are fetched from the application profile.
Tags are enforced via Azure Policy at the subscription level, using a Config-prefixed assignment name.

violations: Introducing a tag that does not apply to all application landing zones
